name: apimatic
description: APIMatic plugin marketplace — SDK-native, version-aware API context for your AI coding agent.

plugins.name: context-matic
plugins.description: Deterministic, version-aware API and SDK context for third-party APIs, delivered directly into your coding agent.

plugins.name: acp-paypal
plugins.description: Integrate and debug PayPal APIs using the acp-paypal MCP server.

plugins.name: paypal-sdk-v4
plugins.description: Skill-only guidance for integrating the PayPal Server SDK v4 into your project.

plugins.name: paypal-plugin
plugins.description: Install and consume the PayPal .NET Server SDK, plus reusable guidance for any APIMatic-generated .NET SDK.

plugins.name: maxio-plugin
plugins.description: Plan and debug Maxio Advanced Billing .NET SDK integrations with maxio-plan and maxio-debug agents, grounded in bundled Maxio SDK skills and the cloned SDK source. No MCP server.
